did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper is a mini-review summarizing existing imaging diagnosis methods (dermoscopy, ultrasound, RCM, LC-OCT) for cutaneous squamous cell carcinoma. It does not use AI, machine learning, or deep learning to obtain its results; it only mentions the future potential of developing an artificial intelligence program to integrate data from these techniques.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
